title: gleichenia pinnata
intro: Gleichenia pinnata, also known as the Fan-leaved Ruff-rush or Fan-leaved Waterclover, is a species of fern in the family Gleicheniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gleichenia pinnata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Gleichenia pinnata include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat a range of conditions.
